hero.title: Shaping Futures Through Ceramic Art
hero.description: A cross-cultural journey of creativity and inclusion, uniting students from three special education schools across Europe to explore the tactile language of clay.

about.title: Collaborative Ceramics Workshops
about.desc: During the project, the partner schools organized a series of hands-on workshops where students and teachers explored different techniques in ceramic art. Each workshop offered new ideas and practical experiences that helped participants develop both creative skills and confidence.
about.desc2: Through these workshops, students had the chance to learn new techniques, exchange ideas, and work creatively with clay. The experience showed how artistic activities can support collaboration, cultural exchange, and skill development, while also encouraging students to explore how their handmade ceramic products could represent their local culture and community.

gallery.title: Student Gallery
gallery.description: A curated selection of works produced by our students.
